name: Yuji Itadori
description: A high school student with immense physical strength who became the vessel for Ryomen Sukuna.

name: Megumi Fushiguro
description: A first-year student at Jujutsu High and a descendant of the Zenin family, utilizing the Ten Shadows Technique.

name: Nobara Kugisaki
description: A confident first-year student who uses a hammer and nails infused with cursed energy.

name: Satoru Gojo
description: The strongest jujutsu sorcerer in the world, possessing both the Six Eyes and the Limitless technique.

name: Ryomen Sukuna
description: The undisputed King of Curses, a legendary sorcerer from the Heian Era.

name: Yuta Okkotsu
description: One of the four Special Grade sorcerers, known for his immense cursed energy and ability to copy other techniques.

name: Toji Fushiguro
description: Megumi's father, a formidable individual with a Heavenly Restriction, granting him exceptional physical abilities without cursed energy.

name: Choso
description: The eldest of the nine Death Painting Wombs, a half-human half-curse hybrid with powerful blood manipulation techniques.
